hooks.command: git fetch --quiet 2>/dev/null; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ]; then BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/$BRANCH 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then echo "Branch $BRANCH is $BEHIND commits behind origin."; fi; fi

FILEPATH=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILEPATH" ] && echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILEPATH" 2>/dev/null; fi

FILEPATH=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILEPATH" ] && echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -qE '\.env\.example$'; then echo '.env.example modified. Reminder: update local .env if new vars added.'; fi

FILEPATH=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILEPATH" ] && echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && ! echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -qE '\.(test|spec)\.(ts|tsx)$'; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILEPATH"); BASE=$(basename "$FILEPATH" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//'); TESTFILE="${DIR}/${BASE}.test.ts"; if [ ! -f "$TESTFILE" ]; then echo "No co-located test file found. Consider: $TESTFILE"; fi; fi

CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf\s+/|DROP\s+(DATABASE|TABLE)|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|format\s+c:|git\s+push\s+--force|docker\s+system\s+prune'; then echo '{"decision":"deny","reason":"Destructive command blocked by baseline hook"}'; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code wartet auf Input" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
